news.title: TD Cowen says Trump’s CFTC prediction markets post unlikely to change legal fight
news.summary: The future of prediction markets will likely be decided by the Supreme Court, while states still appear to hold the advantage, TD Cowen said.

news.title: Falcon Finance taps Anchorage to issue new GENIUS-compliant payments stablecoin fUSD

news.title: Ethereum Traders Grow Increasingly Bearish as ETFs Bleed, ETH Sinks Near $2,000
news.summary: Predictors on Myriad are losing faith, believing it's more likely that Ethereum dumps to $1,500 before a prospective move up to $3,000.

news.title: ElevenLabs, Stability AI Drop New AI Music Models—Can They Catch Suno?
news.summary: Music v2 brings genre-shifting and section-by-section composition to ElevenLabs. Stable Audio 3.0 ships open weights and six-minute tracks. Is either good enough to dethrone the category leader?

news.title: Marvel Comics Icon Stan Lee Has Been 'Revived' With AI Tech—Again
news.summary: ElevenLabs has licensed Stan Lee’s voice and likeness, adding the late Marvel comic creator to a growing market for AI celebrity replicas.

news.title: DeepSeek, Xiaomi Just Made Frontier AI 99% Cheaper. American Labs Went the Other Way
news.summary: Back-to-back price cuts from China's top AI labs have made their models a fraction of the cost of GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus.
